race.comment: ICE KOOL (10) hard to knock winning form and keeps raising the bar with the big weights. Made it two straight wins defeating inferior opposition over 1000m at Randwick in BM78 class. Will find a lot more pressure here but can salute again with the 52.5kg. WAY TO THE STARS (2) Listed winner and Group-placed gelding resuming with an explosive turn of foot. Will stalk the fast tempo from the inside draw and looked to have plenty in the tank when winning his latest trial over 1045m. Top-four contender. ROSELYN'S STAR (4) resumes. Went quickly through the grades fourth-up with a tough on-pace win in the G3 Star Kingdom over 1200m here last March. Looks to be airborne after the two trials and can finish over the top of these. STORM THE RAMPARTS (9) anchored with the big weights of late and gets a much better set-up today. No surprise to see him turn in a stronger showing at the big odds. CIGAR FLICK (5) distance specialist who defeated a good field first-up in Listed grade. Respect.
